_description: Static — workflow graph for AgentZero Lite. Skill-system workflows are intentionally excluded (per project rule). Update when engine .md files change.

workflows.label: Multi-CLI Workflow
workflows.description: Multiple ConPTY tabs hosting different AI CLIs side by side; messages routed between them via WM_COPYDATA + bot-chat
workflows.mermaid:
graph LR
  U[User] --> S[StageActor]
  S --> W[WorkspaceActor]
  W --> T1[Terminal: Claude]
  W --> T2[Terminal: Codex]
  T1 -. bot-chat --from .-> S
  T2 -. bot-chat --from .-> S

workflows.label: AIMODE — Identity-first Handshake
workflows.description: Local AgentBot first-contacts a peer terminal, the peer acks via -cli bot-chat with --from <peerName>, then substantive exchange begins
workflows.mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
  participant U as User
  participant B as AgentBot (local)
  participant R as AgentReactorActor
  participant P as Peer terminal
  U->>B: "Talk to the Claude tab"
  B->>R: StartReactor (Mode 2)
  R->>P: send_to_terminal(handshake)
  P->>B: bot-chat "DONE(handshake-ok)" --from Claude
  R->>P: substantive turn
  P->>B: real reply

workflows.label: Tool-call Loop (dual backend)
workflows.description: Gemma path enforces structure via GBNF sampler; Nemotron path uses native Llama-3.1 chat template. Both share IAgentToolHost
workflows.mermaid:
flowchart TD U[User prompt] --> L[AgentToolLoop] L -->|Gemma path| GBNF[GBNF sampler
5-tool catalog] L -->|Nemotron path| TPL[Llama-3.1 chat template
native tool channel] GBNF --> P[Parse JSON] TPL --> P P --> H[IAgentToolHost
WorkspaceTerminalToolHost] H -->|tool result| L L -->|loop until done| L

workflows.label: LLM Provider Switch
workflows.description: One Local/External radio in the LLM tab; factory returns the right ILlmProvider at runtime. Four hosted/local providers behind a single OpenAiCompatibleProvider
workflows.mermaid:
flowchart TD S["LLM tab — Local · External"] --> F[LlmProviderFactory] F -->|Local| LH["LLamaSharp host
Gemma 4 / Nemotron"] F -->|External| OAC[OpenAiCompatibleProvider] OAC --> W[Webnori] OAC --> O[OpenAI] OAC --> LMS[LM Studio] OAC --> OLL[Ollama]

workflows.label: Voice Pipeline (STT → LLM → TTS)
workflows.description: NAudio mic → dual-VAD → ISpeechToText → LlmGateway.OpenSession → ITextToSpeech → NAudio playback. Mute-while-playing prevents the loop talking to itself
workflows.mermaid:
flowchart LR M[Mic
NAudio
16 kHz mono] --> V[VAD
frame + utterance] V -->|UtteranceEnded| STT[ISpeechToText] STT -->|text| GW[LlmGateway.OpenSession] GW -->|reply| CL[TtsTextCleaner] CL --> TTS[ITextToSpeech] TTS -->|audio bytes| PB[VoicePlaybackService] PB -->|while playing| MUTE[Muted=true] MUTE -.-> M

workflows.label: Release Pipeline
workflows.description: version.txt bump → annotated git tag → GitHub Actions builds win-x64 self-contained ZIP + Inno Setup installer → publishes to GitHub Releases
workflows.mermaid:
graph LR
  V[version.txt bump] --> T[annotated git tag]
  T --> P[git push --tags]
  P --> GA[GitHub Actions]
  GA --> Z[win-x64 ZIP]
  GA --> I[Inno Setup installer]
  Z --> R[GitHub Releases]
  I --> R

workflows.label: Tech Doc Publishing (Notion → X)
workflows.description: Vault-first English drafting in a separate Obsidian repo, then Notion AI-DOC publish, then X announcement (canonical pattern: title + URL + 🔗 backlinks + quote card)
workflows.mermaid:
flowchart LR D[Vault draft
D:\MYNOTE\Tech\AgentZeroLite] --> A[Approval] A --> N[Notion AI-DOC] N --> V[Verify publish] V --> X[X post — canonical] X --> AN[Annotate vault]
